name: Zendaya
description: Zendaya Coleman, born on September 1, 1996, is an American actress, singer, and dancer, best known for her roles in Disney Channel's popular series "Shake It Up" and Marvel's "Spider-Man: Homecoming." She has been in the entertainment industry since 2009 and has quickly risen to fame due to her incredible talent and captivating presence.
creator: deadcool
